title: Breast Pumps - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Breast Pumps 3 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF LINN COUNTY GAP MINISTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Basic goods are offered to clients as they are donated. Goods available may include, but are not limited to household items (cleaning supplies, laundry detergent, toilet paper, and paper towels), personal care supplies (such as toothbrushes and shampoo), durable medical goods, diapers and wipes, linens, towels and blankets, kitchenware (dishes, pots and pans, glasses, etc), and baby blankets. Connects people in need with local churches and service agencies. No financial assistance is available. 1606 Santiam Road SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Low income individuals and families Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Thursday 9am-1pm, Tuesday 5pm-8pm Email (541) 924-5683 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST MOTHERS MILK BANK BREAST PUMP RENTAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides low-cost breast pumps for sale or rental with pick-up, delivery, or mail options, and includes breastfeeding support and instruction. 15875 SW 74th Avenue Suite 100 Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Pregnant, postpartum, and lactating women Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-4:30pm, Friday 9am-3pm Email (503) 469-0955 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF LINN COUNTY GAP MINISTRIES NORTHWEST MOTHERS MILK BANK BREAST PUMP RENTAL PROGRAM
